auth.title: Sign In
auth.description: CRM platform for managing Space Memory & Indigo Mental schools within Global Leaders Skills. Enables comprehensive management of educational processes, communication with students, and facility management.

extras.title: Extra Materials and Programs
extras.subtitle: One-time services and products
extras.infoText: One-time services — no subscription, no pauses, no tariff changes.

detail.txHint: 💡 Transactions and invoices — see below in the «Transactions» section

consent.commentPlaceholder: e.g., where to find the new agreement...
consent.commentHint: This action will be recorded in the student's history.

pause.title: Pause
pause.scheduleHint3: (specific days), not calendar. Pauses and returns are visible in the grid with dates.
pause.datesHint: Return dates are visible on the card and in month details
pause.invoicesText: are not changed. Missed lessons are transferred to the 1st month after return. Corrections are made only upon client's request for a refund.
pause.qualityText3: and assigns to a group. Overpayment is recalculated after actual return.

discount.title: 🏷️ One-time Discount
discount.orderInfo: Order: fixed sums → percentages. One-time discount is applied additionally.
discount.referralAutoInfo: When a discount is assigned to one — the system automatically assigns to the other.
discount.complaintPlaceholder: Describe the compensation reason in detail (visible in history and for accounting)...
discount.approvalInfo: The same manager who approves refunds. Discount is active after their approval.
discount.commentPlaceholder: e.g. Client for 3 years, loyalty discount — please describe the reason

tariff.title: Tariff
tariff.subtitle: REST example: send change and update store.
tariff.warning: ⚠️ Tariff will be changed from {month} {year}. All subsequent months will be recalculated.

extra.title: ➕ Extra Lesson
extra.subtitle: Template (no backend) — fields match design.
extra.name: Name
extra.separateTx: Separate transaction and KSeF invoice. The ➕ card will appear in the grid.
extra.topicPlaceholder: e.g. Review before olympiad, motivation check...
extra.discReasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for the extra discount...

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Complete program and move to archive
archive.warning: This action will stop all future charges. The place in the group will be freed for other students.
archive.commentPlaceholder: Write in detail why the student is leaving. This helps us improve...

invoice.title: 🧾 Edit Invoice
invoice.subtitle: Editing invoice for the selected month.
invoice.ksefWarning: Editing the number or date may affect the KSeF status. If the invoice has already been sent, a correction may be required.

errors.nipNotFound: Company not found in GUS. Please check the NIP number.

korekta.title: Correction (Korekta)
korekta.subtitle: Example window for amount correction.
korekta.commentPlaceholder: Reason for correction — will appear on the Faktura Korekta...
korekta.ksefWarning: The correction will create a new FK/... document in KSeF. The original invoice {fvnum} will be marked as corrected.

refund.title: ↩️ Refund
refund.subtitle: Invoice Refund
refund.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the refund reason in detail — visible to admins and in client history...
refund.warning: The request will go to the «Refunds» tab and will be reviewed by an admin. A Faktura Korekta will be created automatically.

groupSplit.title: 🔄 Change Group / Schedule
groupSplit.infoText2: from the previous one. A record of the change is added to the client history.

editInfo.subtitle: Demo window tied to mock API.

modal.sub: Update last contact date and add a comment

financeSettings.mainSub: System configuration · seller companies · invoice series · users · integrations

firmy.title: Companies / Sellers
firmy.sub: Each company can be assigned to projects · acts as a seller on their invoices
firmy.defaultBanner: The {name} company is used when a project doesn't have a specific company assigned. A project belongs to a company — you can set this here or in {link} tab.
firmy.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this company?

bankAccounts.title: Bank Accounts
bankAccounts.infoBanner: You can add multiple accounts — e.g., separate for cities. The DEFAULT account appears automatically on invoices. On B2B invoices — always the default account.
bankAccounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
bankAccounts.modalSub: The account will be available for selection on invoices
bankAccounts.ibanError: Invalid format or checksum IBAN (PL + 26 digits)

projects.title: Projects → Companies
projects.sub: Each project belongs to one company — this company is the seller on its invoices
projects.infoBanner: A project without an assigned company automatically uses the DEFAULT company. Changing the company only affects new invoices — previously issued ones remain unchanged.
projects.cardSub: The project belongs to the company · the company is its seller on invoices
projects.saveHint: Changes apply from the next issued invoice
projects.modalSub: Define the project and its default invoice series

logo.title: Company Logo
logo.sub: Printed in the PDF header of each invoice
logo.uploadSub: PNG or SVG · max 2 MB · recommended size 300×80px · transparent background
logo.subFooter: Company phone and e-mail in PDF footer

numbering.title: Active Numbering Series
numbering.infoBanner: Counters are atomic (SELECT FOR UPDATE). Manual editing possible only for Super-Admin with written justification. Every change is logged.
numbering.modalInfo: Manual counter adjustment requires written justification. Every change is irreversibly recorded in the audit log.

vat.title: VAT Rates & PKWiU Codes
vat.sub: Configuration per company · can be overridden per project
vat.hintGlobal: Company without its own rates uses global rates
vat.infoBanner: GLS educational services are VAT exempt based on art. 43 sec. 1 item 26 lit. b. The ZW rate is used by default for all educational products. Commercial and B2B courses may require 23%.
vat.cardSubGlobal: Global · applies to all companies without their own settings
vat.saveHint: Changes apply to newly issued invoices
vat.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rate?
vat.modalSubAdd: New rate · will be added to the list
vat.phName: e.g. Commercial services for non-EU companies
vat.phLegalBase: e.g. art. 43 sec. 1 item 26 lit. b
vat.subDefault: Used automatically when no other match is found

emailTemplates.title: Email Templates
emailTemplates.sub: Sent automatically or manually · per company per document type
emailTemplates.infoBanner: Each company can have its own template for each document type. If a company does not have its own template — a global template (default) is used. Variables {{key}} are replaced automatically during sending.
emailTemplates.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this template?

usersRoles.title: System Users
usersRoles.sub: Roles and permissions · module access per role
usersRoles.infoPermissions: The table shows default permissions per role. Super-Admin can grant or revoke individual permissions for each user.
usersRoles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user {name}?
usersRoles.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate user {name}? They will lose access to the system.

userModal.subAdd: New account · invitation email will be sent automatically
userModal.labelPasswordHint: Leave empty — user will set it on first login
userModal.labelInviteHint: User will receive a link to set their password

integrations.title: External Integrations
integrations.sub: Connections with payment systems, KSeF and messaging
integrations.whatsappInfo: WhatsApp Business API — contact Meta Business provider

export.title: Data Export & Comarch ERP Optima
export.fmtXlsxDesc:
Invoice No. · Date · Client · NIP · Net · VAT · Gross · Status
For: bookkeeping, internal control
export.fmtZipDesc:
Collection of invoice PDFs for selected period + CSV index
For: archive, submission to tax office
export.fmtXmlDesc:
Native Comarch ERP Optima format · XML import
For: accounting office
export.fmtJpkDesc:
XML format according to MF schema (JPK_FA v3)
For: tax audit (on request)
export.hintComarchId: Default K1. Change if accounting office uses a different ID.
export.subAutoClients: If the client does not exist in Comarch — they will be added during XML import
export.labelIncludeCorrections: Include corrective invoices (FK/) in Comarch export

archived.pageSubTitle: students who will not be studying

info.title: Archive Logic · rules for working with archived students
info.rule1: Here are students who for some reason will not be studying. They are not deleted — their data is saved.
info.rule2: The reason for archiving is recorded during the transfer and is visible in the "Archive Comment" column.
info.rule3: A student can be returned to the new students list or transferred to a group via the "···" menu.
info.rule4: The last contact date and manager are saved from previous stages and are available for viewing.
info.rule5: Role Manager — full access. Quality — view history. Sales — transfer and return.

archive.returnSub: The student will be moved to the new students list

info.title: Business Logic · Closing Rules
info.rule1: Only students enrolled in a group but who haven't started classes are listed here. The sales department works with them.
info.rule2: Red strip on the left — no contact for more than 7 days. Requires an urgent call.
info.rule3: Contact date, manager, and comment can be edited directly in the row — changes are saved immediately.
info.rule4: After archiving with a reason, the student disappears from the tab and moves to the «Archive» section.
info.rule5: Role Manager — full access. Quality — view and restore. Sales — edit and move.
